items.name: A. Boeken Fabric and Notions Shop
items.description: Classic Amsterdam institution. Buttons, trims, and a big fabric wall.
items.beforeYouGo: Cash preferred. Closed Sundays. Weekday mornings are calm; weekends are chaos.

items.name: De Stofkamer
items.description: Curated selection of natural fabrics and sewing supplies in the Jordaan.
items.beforeYouGo: Small space — only a few customers at a time. Best to visit on a weekday.

items.name: Nicoletta Stoffen
items.description: Italian fabrics, silks, and jersey. Great for special occasion sewing.
items.beforeYouGo: Prices are on the higher end but quality is excellent. No returns on cut fabric.

items.name: Priem Stoffen
items.description: Budget-friendly fabrics and remnants. Good for muslins and practice pieces.
items.beforeYouGo: Check the remnants bin in the back — great deals on end-of-bolt pieces.

items.name: Het Fourniturenhoekie
items.description: Tiny notions shop packed floor to ceiling with buttons, zippers, elastics, and thread.
items.beforeYouGo: Hard to find — look for the green door on Nieuwe Hoogstraat. Cash only.

items.name: Stof & Zo
items.description: Friendly local shop in central Haarlem with good selection of cotton and linen.
items.beforeYouGo: Closed Mondays. Owner is happy to cut samples if you're unsure.

items.name: Bep Stoffen
items.description: Large fabric shop with a wide range of dress fabrics, jersey, and upholstery.
items.beforeYouGo: Parking nearby on Saturdays can be tricky. Take the tram.

items.name: De Naaiwinkel
items.description: Well-stocked notions shop with a good range of interfacing, patterns, and tools.
items.beforeYouGo: Staff are very knowledgeable — don't hesitate to ask for advice.

items.name: Rechte Steek
items.description: Fabrics, yarn, embroidery thread, and notions — plus workshops in tufting, needle felting, macramé, and sewing.
items.beforeYouGo: Also runs a bookable workspace and a recurring knitting café (Brei Cafe). Check Instagram for workshop dates.

items.name: MooiZooi
items.description: Creative warehouse selling fabric offcuts, cork, wood scraps, and other craft materials reclaimed from companies — priced by the basketful.
items.beforeYouGo: A social enterprise — great prices on scraps and remnants. Good for experimental projects and one-offs. Bring cash and a big bag.

items.name: The Kind Fabric
items.description: Natural and deadstock fabrics by the metre — linen, cotton, viscose — plus sewing patterns. Strong focus on sustainability.
items.beforeYouGo: Free shipping in NL over €70, Belgium/Germany over €90. Free fabric samples (up to 5) available. Also sells Fibre Mood and Cousette patterns.

items.name: Aalsmeer Stoffen & Fournituren
items.description: Out-of-the-way gem near the flower auction. Excellent prices on fabric rolls.
items.beforeYouGo: Worth the trip — combine with a visit to the Bloemenveiling. Pin the address carefully.

items.name: Kniphal
items.description: 600 m² store on Albert Cuypstraat with a huge range of curtain, interior, and fashion fabrics. Also has a webshop at stof.nl with 2,500+ fabric types.
items.beforeYouGo: Large space with continuous new arrivals — good for interior and fashion fabrics in one visit. Open Mon–Sat from 9:30.

items.name: N&N Stoffen
items.description: Well-established shop on Albert Cuypstraat with a broad assortment — clothing fabrics, jersey, denim, linen, velvet, upholstery, and sewing supplies. Loyalty points system. Also sells ready-made patterns.
items.beforeYouGo: One of the most-reviewed fabric shops in the Netherlands (9.2/10). Online ordering with pickup also available.

items.name: Nanucci Tessuti
items.description: Premium fabric shop on Albert Cuypstraat since 1949. Liberty Art Fabrics, designer silks, bridal fabrics, and GOTS-certified organic textiles.
items.beforeYouGo: Go here for Liberty prints, silk, and high-end cottons. Prices match the quality — budget accordingly.

items.name: Silk Route
items.description: Fabrics for wedding, evening, and ceremonial dress with an Eastern and Asian focus — silks, beaded, sequined, embroidered, and feathered textiles in a burst of colour.
items.beforeYouGo: No website. If you're making anything festive or special-occasion, this is your shop. Phone: +31 20 679 9600.

items.name: Jefertti Stoffen
items.description: Turkish fabric shop on Albert Cuypstraat with a wide range of clothing fabrics at mid to low prices.
items.beforeYouGo: No website — visit in person. Open Mon–Sat approx. 10:30–17:00. Good for affordable dress fabrics.

items.name: Hennie Dost
items.description: Specialist curtain fabric shop on Albert Cuypstraat with 1,000+ types of curtain and sheer fabric, plus custom-made curtains.
items.beforeYouGo: Not a dressmaking shop — purely curtain and interior fabric. In business since the late 1970s. Phone: +31 20 671 1591.

items.name: Folk + Fiber
items.description: Boutique in central Haarlem specialising in natural-fibre fabrics — European flax linens, ecological fabrics, and deadstock. Also stocks sewing patterns and haberdashery.
items.beforeYouGo: Open Tue–Sat 10:30–17:00. Run by Gina, who also teaches sewing workshops in the space. Small but beautifully curated.

items.name: Tessuti
items.description: Fashion and luxury fabric shop in Den Haag centre with a tailoring atelier, curtain design service, and sewing lessons.
items.beforeYouGo: Open Tue–Sat 10:00–18:00, Sun 12:30–17:30. Also offers bespoke tailoring and custom curtains in the same space.

items.name: Cross & Woods
items.description: Craft shop in Den Haag with yarn (indie dyers), fabric, notions, patterns, books, and project bags. Strong focus on natural fibres and sustainability.
items.beforeYouGo: Hosts free Craft Nights on the first Friday of every month — a good way to meet local makers. Open Tue–Sat 10:00–17:00.

items.name: Van Domburg Textiel
items.description: Well-stocked fabric and yarn shop in Den Haag with Oeko-Tex certified and organic options. Carries Phildar, Rico Design, and Swafing. Also ships to Belgium, Germany, and France.
items.beforeYouGo: Open Tue–Sat; closes early on Wednesdays (14:00). Free NL shipping over €100. Good range of deadstock and recycled fabrics.

items.name: The Fabric Sales
items.description: Belgium's first designer deadstock fabric store — cotton, silk, wool, linen, viscose, and specialty fabrics. Also mystery zero-waste packs and haberdashery.
items.beforeYouGo: Based in Rotselaar, Belgium. Physical showroom open Wed–Fri 10:00–16:30. Shipping to NL takes 3–10 days via DHL.
